sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3677" key="a)kroxeiri/s" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκροχειρ-ίς·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὸ ἄκρον τῆς χειρός</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </entryFree>
